    Third Upgrades Mod

    Description

    In every nine standard H3 town, you have opportunity to upgrade creatures once more. Mod is based at ERA's Third Upgrades Mod v2.17.0.

    Version

    1.1.8

    Author

    VMaiko, avatar, Xardas33 (upgraded buildings graphics)

    Contact

    http://heroescommunity.com/viewthread.php3?TID=46241

    Repository

    View mod on GitHub

    Screenshots

    Submods
